message:
conformance: refresh symbol_fixture_coverage.v1.json

Regenerated via `scripts/check_symbol_fixture_coverage.sh` after
the fixture schema + reporter refactor that landed in adjacent
commits. The file is produced by rolling the per-family fixture
corpus against the exported-symbol table and emitting per-module
coverage deltas.

Visible deltas:

- Per-family records gain the fields that every other
  conformance v1 report already had
  (`milestone_beads`, `recommended_bead`, `severity`,
  `severity_score`, `status_breakdown`, `target_*`,
  `target_uncovered_symbols`, etc.) so the coverage report is now
  queryable with the same jq shape used by the rest of the
  conformance scripts.
- `math_abi` covered_symbols bumped from 14 to 19 as a side effect
  of recent math ABI work (sincosf32/sincosf64/erff/erfcf/expm1f
  regressions closing, etc.) — the underlying implementations
  were landed in earlier commits; this file catches the report up
  to reality.
- `target_uncovered_symbols` lists are now sorted alphabetically
  so diffs read cleanly.

Pure regeneration — no test assertion or script logic is changed
here. The script that emits this file was also touched in a
sibling commit (write to target/conformance/ instead of mktemp),
so the two land together.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
